title: Drop Stack Keybind Modifier
description: This project adds a configurable modifier key for dropping full stacks.
body:
In Minecraft you can drop more than one item simultaneously by pressing 'Ctrl' along with your selected keybind for dropping items.
However you cannot alter that modifier, since it's hardcoded into the game.
This mod allows you to modify it to your liking in the default keybinds menu.
Enjoy!
